scenarios.title: Vector Database Python Clients
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks that use the Python qdrant-client package, QdrantClient, AsyncQdrantClient, qdrant_client.models, Qdrant Cloud, or local Qdrant mode.
scenarios.role: Provides self-contained routing and workflow guidance for the Qdrant Python client package.
scenarios.read_when: qdrant-client, QdrantClient, AsyncQdrantClient, qdrant_client.models, Qdrant Cloud, FastEmbed, local mode, upload_collection, upload_points, migrate, REST/gRPC conversion
scenarios.best_for: Connecting to Qdrant, prototyping with local mode, running sync or async operations, constructing model objects, using inference objects, bulk uploading vectors, and migrating collections.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is about running the Qdrant server itself, designing vector search concepts without Python client code, or using another vector database client.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `qdrant-client` for practical Python client usage. Prefer local-mode for no-server examples, connection-and-transport for URL/auth/gRPC setup, client-operations for normal API calls, inference for Document/Image/FastEmbed/Cloud inference, migration-and-upload for large ingestion, and models-and-conversions for schema or REST/gRPC debugging.

scenarios.title: Agentic RAG And Search Integrations
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks where an agent or application integrates Qdrant vector storage, retrieval, filtering, hybrid search, or embeddings through the Python client.
scenarios.role: Explains how to map RAG/search tasks onto qdrant-client local, remote, inference, query, upload, and model APIs.
scenarios.read_when: RAG, semantic search, vector upload, sparse vectors, hybrid query, filters, payload indexes, FastEmbed, Qdrant Cloud inference, query_points
scenarios.best_for: Building or debugging Python retrieval flows that create collections, upload vectors/documents, query with filters or fusion, and validate model/input schemas.
scenarios.avoid_when: The request needs framework-specific integration code for LangChain, LlamaIndex, or a non-Qdrant vector store without direct qdrant-client API usage.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Use when the task mentions Qdrant-backed retrieval, payload filters, vector upload, or inference objects. Start at root, then route to inference for embedding inputs or client-operations for query and collection APIs.
